strings.host/input/placeholder: Drop files here or click to add...
strings.host/config/placeholder: Config UI is provided by plugins.
strings.host/config/activateByInput: Add input files to activate plugin config.
strings.host/config/noPluginHint: You need to add a plugin first. Click “Add plugin” in the top-right.
strings.host/process/placeholder: Logs and progress will appear here.
strings.host/output/placeholder: Converted files will be listed here.
strings.host/process/keepTemp: Keep temp files on disk (for troubleshooting)
strings.host/process/pauseTooltip: Takes effect before the next file starts (current file is not stopped immediately).
strings.host/output/templateHelp:
Template placeholders:
- {base}: original filename without extension (e.g. "input")
- {ext}: target extension (e.g. "mp4")
- {index}: sequence number in batch (starts at 1)

Example: {base}.{ext} → input.mp4
strings.host/pluginManager/pickerUnavailable: Cannot open file picker (StorageProvider unavailable). Try restarting the app or use “Add plugin” on the main window.
strings.host/pluginInstall/error/manifestNotFoun: Invalid plugin package: manifest.json not found.
strings.host/pluginInstall/error/manifestNotUniq: Invalid plugin package: multiple manifest.json files found.
strings.host/pluginInstall/error/manifestInvalid: Invalid plugin package: manifest.json is invalid.
strings.host/pluginInstall/error/missingTerminat: Plugin does not meet host requirements: supportsTerminationOnCancel=true is required.
strings.host/pluginInstall/error/filesInUse: Install failed: plugin files are in use. Stop current tasks or restart ConverTool and retry.
strings.host/pluginInstall/error/filesLocked: Install failed: plugin files are locked by another process. Close the lock holder and retry.
